name: St. Anthony Of Padua
description_short: St. Anthony of Padua FCU is a member-owned credit union serving Fall River, MA and surrounding communities with checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and mobile banking access.
description_long:
St. Anthony of Padua Federal Credit Union (SAPFCU) is a non-profit, member-owned financial institution based in Fall River, Massachusetts. The credit union has been serving its local community and has established itself as a community banking option for residents in Fall River, Somerset, Swansea, Westport, Freetown, Tiverton, and Little Compton. As a federally-insured credit union, SAPFCU operates under NCUA oversight with member deposits insured up to at least $250,000.

SAPFCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products and services including multiple checking and savings account options, share certificates, money market accounts, auto loans (with rates as low as 3.99% APR), personal loans (spring specials at 5.99% APR), mortgages including first and second mortgages, and lines of credit. The credit union has modernized its service delivery through mobile banking apps for Apple iPhone and Android devices, online account access, virtual branch services, and online check ordering. Members can also manage accounts through the CO-OP ATM Network, which provides access to nearly 30,000 surcharge-free ATMs nationwide, and the recently added MoneyPass ATM network.

Key distinguishing factors include SAPFCU's local focus on a seven-town service area, extended Saturday hours (9 AM-12 PM noon), and dedicated member resources including forms, ATM locators, and helpful links. The credit union actively promotes special loan offers and refinancing opportunities, and provides 24/7 lost/stolen debit card support. Their physical location at 806 Bedford Street in Fall River remains accessible during regular business hours, with phone support at 508-674-3019.

As a traditional credit union, SAPFCU is best suited for individuals seeking community-based banking with competitive rates on loans and savings products. The main consideration is limited service hours (closed Wednesdays) and a geographically restricted field of membership, making it accessible only to those living or working in the designated service area.
pros: Access to nearly 30,000 surcharge-free ATMs nationwide through CO-OP Network plus MoneyPass network coverage
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 3.99% APR with direct phone application process
Free mobile banking app for iOS and Android with bill pay, balance checks, and fund transfers
Extended Saturday hours (9 AM-12 PM) providing weekend banking access
Member deposits federally insured up to at least $250,000 backed by full faith of U.S. Government
Diverse product offerings including checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, personal loans, and lines of credit
24/7 lost/stolen debit card support through secondary number (1-800-472-3272) after hours
cons: Limited service area restricted to seven Massachusetts communities (Fall River, Somerset, Swansea, Westport, Freetown, Tiverton, Little Compton)
Closed on Wednesdays, reducing weekly banking accessibility for some members
Limited hours on most days (9 AM-4 PM Monday-Tuesday, 9 AM-5 PM Thursday, 9 AM-6 PM Friday only)
No details provided on membership eligibility requirements or application process on website
Website does not disclose specific APR ranges for most products (mortgages, credit cards, savings rates require rate viewing)
best_for: Residents of Fall River and surrounding Massachusetts communities seeking local relationship banking
Individuals needing competitive auto loan rates with straightforward application process
Members desiring surcharge-free ATM access through national networks with local credit union service
Borrowers interested in mortgages and refinancing from a community-focused institution
diagnosis: St. Anthony of Padua FCU is ideal for residents within its seven-town Massachusetts service area seeking community-based banking with competitive loan rates and nationwide ATM access. The primary caveat is geographic restriction to a limited service area and reduced service hours, particularly the Wednesday closure.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: St. Anthony of Padua (Fall River, MA) | CreditDoc
meta_description: St. Anthony of Padua — NCUA-insured credit union in Fall River, MA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
